case_title: CAROL RICKERT VS. TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CAROL RICKERT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CATHERINE EANDI (DAUGHTER). DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICES, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GREG KEEF (PRESIDENT AND CEO). DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY L. ROBINSON (CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE). COURT DISMISS CASE AGAINST SAFEWAY, INC WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-01-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED JUL-08-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL UNTIMELY BUT GRANTED BASED ON THE REASON. FOLLOW NOTICE REQUIREMENT IN THE FUTURE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICKERT, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, CASE AGAINST SAFEWAY, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. TRITON GLOBAL SERVICES OWES PLAINTIFF $1,000.00 BECAUSE THEIR EMPLOYEE COMMITTED A BATTERY WHEN HE HIT PLAINTIFF WITH A ROW OF SHOPPING CARTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RICKERT, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC. SAFEWAY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANTHONY L. ROBINSON, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED JUL-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GREG KEEF, PRESIDENT AND CEO. FILED BY DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CATHERINE M. EANDI, DAUGHTER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICKERT, CAROL
